[2018-05-01 12:40] masn6811 (Masne98888): `..DD/A+Mobile Animus`
[2018-05-01 12:40] masn6811 (Masne98888): This can be strong depending on the set
[2018-05-01 12:40] masn6811 (Masne98888): also, it's a really hard punish to DD/DDE
[2018-05-01 12:41] masn6811 (Masne98888): Mobile Animus is by far the best fang enabler. better than husk or the like
[2018-05-01 12:41] p0lari (Polari): oh yeah mobile animus is a thing nowadays
[2018-05-01 12:41] p0lari (Polari): that does sound actually good
[2018-05-01 12:41] masn6811 (Masne98888): `DD/DD/A+Mobile Animus` for p1 can often beat natural conduit, but is bad against famius
[2018-05-01 12:42] masn6811 (Masne98888): there are cases where if you are p1 and you want a fast fang, you go for `DD/D+Mobile Animus/TA`
[2018-05-01 12:42] masn6811 (Masne98888): because p2 can't go fastimus against a t2 mobile animus
[2018-05-01 12:42] masn6811 (Masne98888): but p2 can mirror the mobile animus, and then you might have a problem
[2018-05-01 12:43] masn6811 (Masne98888): often you can just get2 or three fangs and click the moba
[2018-05-01 12:43] masn6811 (Masne98888): then you transition to a forge, and play a game where you are up a bunch of sword econ
[2018-05-01 12:44] masn6811 (Masne98888): back when fang costed 7 :Red: :Red: :Red: , `DD/DD/DDB` was a really strong line for p1
[2018-05-01 12:44] masn6811 (Masne98888): it threatens a GB transition to punish super agressive build
[2018-05-01 12:44] masn6811 (Masne98888): but it also threatens AA
[2018-05-01 12:44] masn6811 (Masne98888): which allows for wall+fang, and is often basically unbeatable
[2018-05-01 12:45] masn6811 (Masne98888): also, 12-fang beat natural animus, which is pretty good
[2018-05-01 12:45] masn6811 (Masne98888): it's been a pretty dumpster unit since the nerf to 8RRR until mobile animus got released recently
[2018-05-01 12:45] masn6811 (Masne98888): mobile animus is the nuts

[2018-05-03 17:22] d4nny_pita (Danny M): Hey guys, how does vacation penalty work?
I was away from home for two weeks and got a vacation penalty to my ELO (which I totally understand why)
[2018-05-03 17:22] d4nny_pita (Danny M): Yesterday I played a few games and saw that I was needing 10 more games to remove that penalty
[2018-05-03 17:22] p0lari (Polari): your real rating doesn't change but your displayed rating does
[2018-05-03 17:22] d4nny_pita (Danny M): When I just played today, I played two games and saw that I need 13 more games
[2018-05-03 17:22] p0lari (Polari): once you play enough games they become the same again
[2018-05-03 17:23] d4nny_pita (Danny M): How am I supposed to get out of vacation penalty as I'm not usually playing lots of games a day
[2018-05-03 17:23] d4nny_pita (Danny M): Yeah I understood that, my question was more about how is calculated the amo_unt of games to paly to get back in?
[2018-05-03 17:23] d4nny_pita (Danny M): I'm far from a top player so I do'nt really care about ELO, was just wondering
[2018-05-03 17:24] p0lari (Polari): I'm guessing it's 5 for a penalty week and you just hit a full week there
[2018-05-03 17:24] p0lari (Polari): try #ask_a_dev if you want more knowledgeable answers
[2018-05-03 17:24] d4nny_pita (Danny M): I've not checked the details of the number of days and stuff but you may be right
[2018-05-03 17:24] p0lari (Polari): it's something like that anyway, the penalty gets larger the longer you're away
[2018-05-03 17:25] d4nny_pita (Danny M): Yeah, but I'm surprised it keep getting bigger while I got back in
[2018-05-03 17:26] extratricky: it's 15 games in 2 weeks (it might actually be 15 days but I'm not sure), and you lose 15 points of displayed rating for each game under 15 in that time span
[2018-05-03 17:28] extratricky: so the fact that it went up just means that some of your old games went outside of the window
[2018-05-03 17:30] d4nny_pita (Danny M): Oh okay, thanks! I definitely play enough games a day to eventually get back 😄
[2018-05-03 17:32] supergreyman (Greyman): If it's true that it only affects your displayed rating but not your real rating, you could technically become a secret grandmaster in disguise. 🤔
[2018-05-03 17:33] d4nny_pita (Danny M): Would be fun, except it won't happen given how bad I am 😄 But I could be a secret ninja enjoying the game without anyone knowing about me ^^
